name: The Spaceship Crew (Alien Pov)
description:
The Spaceship Crew was sent on a mission to travel through space to enter the abandoned generation spaceship, reported to have an alien signal. Their task is to capture the alien, dead or alive. However, they do not know what type of alien they are, whether it's harmless or not.

[LEGACY] Character's Profile

https://docs.google.com/document/d/16Iz-d-EfAX0P6Q_mfs_jrCVzGQGfX4KdKbuNFYvSMAc

Error on the eyepatch but oh well.

-----

Choose your Alien

Warning these aren't in the character's codes. This is merely just a suggestion if you have no idea what alien you want to be. You are more than welcome to use the Xenomorph as your alien.

Normal Alien: It has a humanoid body and looks like your typical alien.

The Hunter: The alien that hunts its prey using the stealth option to eliminate its prey.

The Tentacle Alien: Self-explanatory.

The Shapeshifter: Become the Imposter of one of the Crew. (Warning: You will face a lot of problems with the characters talking for you, and you might find this very unsatisfying)

The Blind Angel: A blind alien that uses echolocation to find its prey.

The Living Spaceship: You're not an alien on the Spaceship. You ARE the Spaceship.

The Symbiotic Alien: You're either a human with a Symbiotic alien inside you or you are the Symbiotic Alien and could latch onto the crew. (Might not work as well)

[Warning: You might run into problems with the AI talking and taking action for you that you might need to prevent it through edits and messing around the tempature settings. I tried my best to prevent this from happening, but it is still possible to run into this problem. You also might find the character to behave out of character, and that's what happens for having 7 characters in one bot. Please note it is recommended to use the third person in your messages instead of the first to prevent further problems.]

🪤
creator: Mrkingthebest123
